title: Shura Youjo no Eiyuutan: Hanpasha to Iwa Reta Youhei, Youjo ni Tensei Shite Nariagaru
titleRomaji: Shura Youjo no Eiyuutan: Hanpasha to Iwa Reta Youhei, Youjo ni Tensei Shite Nariagaru
titleNative: 修羅幼女の英雄譚　～半端者と言われた傭兵、幼女に転生して成り上がる～
synonyms: The Heroic Tale of Shura Young Girl: A Mercenary Who was Said to be Half-Baked is Reincarnated as a Young Girl and Rises to Success
synopsis: "If I had a second life, wouldn't I be a ‘hero’ again?" Solfort Enuma is an old soldier who has spent more than 60 years training to become a 'hero'. He was an ordinary man with no talent, but he never gave up and continued to pursue his dream. One day, Solfort faced the 'hero' he had always longed for, but his sword failed to strike a blow and he met an unrewarding end... It was supposed to happen, but Solfort found himself reincarnated as a young girl...! Now her (his) heroic tale begins, as she (he) changes her name to Sol, to once again pursue the dream that did not come true in her previous life!

He tries to live a comfortable and convenient life with the help of his tutor Mashin Hakase's, and his father's inventions, but he always fails and causes a big ruckus. synopsis: The story starts with Ogata Shinsaku, a homeless 17-year-old boy who was disowned by his father and head of a major company, Tatsumi Takaaki. One day, an old man appears and gives Shinsaku 100 million yen, urging him to use it as he sees fit, so he starts his own company to fight against his father's business empire.

titleNative: 推しと出会って元気になったから恩返し、します！
synopsis: Doi started his career as a consultant with dreams and hopes. However, due to repeated stress, he lost his voice and was forced to take a leave of absence. "This might be the end of me..." In his despair, he mistakenly enters a soba noodle shop and meets Masato, the man of his dreams...! A super-beautiful store owner and a stressed-out office worker. If it's for the sake of my idol, even if it's in fire or water! A love romance that will blow away your stress! (Source: Kadokawa, translated) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

titleRomaji: Honzuki no Gekokujou: Ferdinand no Yakata ni Te
titleNative: 本好きの下剋上　フェルディナンドの館にて
synopsis: Ferdinand, High Priest at the Temple of Ehrenfest, had three trusted confidants: knight Eckhart, scholar Justus, and attendant Lasfam. They gathered whenever occasion arose, bringing diverse information to share. What follows reveals their true selves—the stories unfolding behind the scenes of the main narrative. Reading this will make you love the world of "Honzuki" even more! This is the start of a series of exquisite bibliophile fantasy stories told from the perspectives of the three who swore loyalty to Ferdinand!! (Source: Corona EX, translated)

title: Osaka Hwansangseon
synopsis: Kim Yong, a Zainichi Korean boy from Osaka, accidentally gets caught up in a fight with the nephew of a yakuza. Kim Yong is given the mission of infiltrating a Korean village and stealing an ID card by order of the yakuza. The villagers, who seemed ordinary, seem to be up to something... At first, he only thought of completing the mission and receiving money, but Kim Yong gradually becomes one with the villagers and joins the village's goal of 'establishing a homeland in Osaka. (Source: Naver, translated)

However, Iwao is trying to use Hiromi's brain to enter the realm of the divine, which is inaccessible to humans... (Source: Kodansha, translated)

titleNative: 明日もいい日でありますように。～異世界で新しい家族ができました～三兄弟のほっこりご飯日記
synopsis: Three brothers—Yuito, Haruto, and Yuuma—lost their mother in a traffic accident and were taken in by their father (who lived apart from her), spending their days enduring unreasonable violence. Just when they were on the verge of despair, given no proper meals and having no relatives to rely on—they were caught in a landslide and all three were reincarnated together into an isekai. A passing adventurer, Thomas, protected the three who had collapsed by the roadside, and together with his wife Olivia, who runs the eatery "Olive Tree," they welcomed the three as a "new family"... A warm isekai slow life spun by the beloved three brothers begins! (Source: Earth Star Entertainment, translated)
searchTerms: Ashita mo Ii Hi de Arimasu You ni.: Isekai de Atarashii Kazoku ga Dekimashita - 3 Kyoudai no Hokkori Gohan Nikki

On the day he meets his Tokyo landlord, Taka Mitora, Naruo is attacked by the "black figure" but is saved by a white tiger. From that day on, mysterious incidents begin to occur around Naruo...!? This is a story of love and desire between a divine beast and a human. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Kubinashi Seirei-sama ni Kuchizuke wo
titleNative: 首なし精霊様に口づけを
synopsis: A deadly curse is slowly killing Teo, and none of the healers or magic users he's ever met have been able to help him - until one day, during his travels, he finds the natural spirit Arvahany. Arvahany hates humans and has secrets of his own, not the least of which is that he has lost a considerable part of his powers. Teo has something he wants, and so he binds him with a contract to save himself, promising Teo to break his curse at the end of it, as a reward. But will the two be able to save each other? It might be much harder than either of them thought...

title: Transformers Legends
titleNative: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ
synopsis: Starting off as 4koma and published online to promote the titular Transformers Legends toyline, with special Bonus Edition (出張版 Shutchōban) chapters of the comic packed with the toys themselves, it Initially showcased the misadventures of the Beast Wars cast re-imagined as adult Transformers fans, before eventually taking a more story-driven approach and attempting to connect all the entries of the Japanese Generation 1 anime and manga continuity into one storyline. Heavily marketed towards adult collectors and otaku in the face of the brand's dwindling popularity with children after TakaraTomy's largely unsuccessful first attempt in the mid-2000s, it attempted to change the image of the Transformers franchise, with much more "adult", often ecchi-filled humour and numerous references to fan culture. Ulltimately concluded when TakaraTomy began a brand unification with Hasbro starting with Power of the Primes, deciding to mainly sell Hasbro toys as is with minimal changes to packaging. It was eventually succeeded by the more action-oriented Generations Selects Special Comic promoting Hasbro and TakaraTomy's joint Generations Selects imprint. (Source: TFwiki, edited)
searchTerms: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ

titleRomaji: Kiss toka Koi toka, NG nano ni
titleNative: キスとか恋とか、NGなのに
synopsis: Rio and Yakumo are members of the idol group KEy, formed through an audition program. One day, while wishing to become closer to the cool Yakumo, an unexpected kiss completely changes their relationship! It turns out Yakumo was actually a super-devoted fan, absolutely obsessed and in love with Rio! Since confessing his feelings, Yakumo's romantic and lustful desires have only escalated. Seeing the special side he only shows him, Rio begins to waver between friendship and love... (Source: Overlap, translated) Note: Includes two extra chapters.

title: Usapyon
synopsis: One day, a mysterious creature calling itself "Usapyon" appears in the room of Soma, a college student leading an empty life. This being, which looks human but isn't, calls Soma "older brother" and forces him to play video games with it... Before he knows it, his room is filled with pink things!? Involving those around them, something that had been stagnant begins to move. A strange and cute cohabitation comedy! (Source: Shu-Cream, translated)

title: Blood Friend
synopsis: The violent horror manga is set in an old western-style mansion rumored to be haunted, on the outskirts of a town. A group of elementary school students gather at the mansion for a test of courage. One of the students, a girl who has been overcome with a terrible premonition, tells the group, "One of us will never come back." (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Ju-Hui-ui Juwi
synopsis: Min, who can see ghosts. And Ju-Hui, who was Min’s best friend since childhood. Min never saw ghosts when she was with Ju-Hui, and thanks to that, she grew up leading a normal life, but Ju-Hui passed away at a young age in a mysterious accident. Min was certain that was the case... but in high school, she reunites with Ju-Hui, who is very much alive. However, the Ju-Hui Min knew is nowhere to be found, and this Ju-Hui feels strangely different. (Source: Naver, translated)

title: The (Poisoned) Invincible Poison Magician
titleNative: （毒殺された）世界無双の毒魔法使い
synopsis: Londo Von Edward was born as the illegitimate child of a noble. Since he seemed to have no magical abilities his family considered him worthless. When he came of age at 15, his father, ordered him to drink poison so it would seem like he had committed suicide. Londo sees so other option than to drink the poison. However, instead of killing him, the poison causes a magic symbol to appear on his back and awakens his ability to use poison magic. Realizing that his life is not over yet, he uses his newfound power to make his escape from the family that cast him aside and start life anew. (Source: Mangamo)
chapterSourceTitle: (Dokusatsu Sareta) Sekai Musou no Doku Mahoutsukai

title: Yuuyuu Jiteki.
synopsis: Chihiro Suzuki, a serious and reserved college boy, meets Miyu Washio, an older girl with an incredibly positive attitude, while working at a convenience store near his new home. “Let’s make some happy memories right now!” Her unpredictable ideas for “fun” — and her wholehearted enjoyment of the moment — gradually transforms his dull and uneventful daily life. From their slightly offbeat conversations, an unexpected new chapter in their lives begins. This is a sweet and fresh coming-of-age romantic comedy that starts with “friendship”! (Source: NicoNico Seiga, translated)
